English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University concert and Sage Chapel programs
Cornell University
14-20-417
6.6 cubic feet. 6.6 cubic feet.
1878-2017. Programs, correspondence, brochures, publications, photographs. Programs of concerts and recitals at Cornell University. Collection material in English 2247269
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC staff
Date completed:
June 2009
EAD encoding:
Kavitha Reddy, June 2009
Last modified:
Jude Corina, April 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
This collection contains programs of concerts and recitals by Cornell and non-Cornell groups that took place at Cornell University. Cornell groups represented in the collection include the Wind Symphony, Chorus, Chamber Orchestra, Symphony Orchestra, Contemporary Chamber Players, Percussion Ensemble, Wind Ensemble, Cornell Jazz Festival, Cornell Glee Club and others. Also programs for Cornell United Religious Works and Sage Chapel events and services such as organ recitals and vespers.
RELATED MATERIALS
Cornell University Dept. of Music records, #14-20-513
Cornell University Music Library records, #13-7-2584
Welsey Barnet Carroll music programs, #37-5-1989
Cornell University Chorus records, #14-20-3125
Cornell University Glee Club records, #37-6-2399
Sage Chapel programs, #39-5-371
Elizabeth Lyman theater and concert programs, #2239
NOTES
Includes collection #14-20-353.
Cite As:
Cornell University concert and Sage Chapel programs, #14-20-417. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Programs (documents) Music. Concert programs -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Bailey Hall (Cornell University) Cornell University. Concert Band Cornell University. Orchestra Cornell University. Festival of Contemporary Arts Cornell University. Symphonic Band Willard Straight Hall (Ithaca, N.Y.) Sage Chapel (Cornell University)
